text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 156 

OPRTG_ROOM_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Operating Room Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for the operating room, recovery room, and labor 
delivery room used by the beneficiary during the stay. 

SHORT NAME: OROOMAMT 

LONG NAME: OPRTG_ROOM_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating
